views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Active shopping list grouped by category with progress bar showing checked vs total items, budget summary cards showing estimated total and amount remaining, and floating quick-add button

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Quick add item modal with item name field, category picker, quantity stepper with unit selector, estimated price input, and priority toggle

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: Past shopping trips grouped by date showing total spend per trip, number of items purchased, completion rate, and calendar heatmap of shopping frequency

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Spending trends line chart over 4 weeks, category breakdown donut chart, most purchased items ranking list, and actionable budget insights

viewModelComputedProperties.name: activeItems
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Unchecked items in the current list sorted by priority (essential first) then alphabetically within each priority

viewModelComputedProperties.name: completedItems
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Items checked off today, sorted by most recently checked

viewModelComputedProperties.name: completionPercentage
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Ratio of checked items to total items in today's list (0.0 to 1.0)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: estimatedTotal
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of (estimatedPrice × quantity) for all items in the current active list

viewModelComputedProperties.name: checkedTotal
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of (estimatedPrice × quantity) for all checked-off items in the current session

viewModelComputedProperties.name: remainingBudget
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Weekly budget goal minus total spent this week; negative means over budget

viewModelComputedProperties.name: itemsByCategory
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Active unchecked items grouped by grocery category for aisle-organized shopping view

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Consecutive weeks with at least one completed shopping trip (items checked off)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklySpending
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Total estimated cost of all checked items from Monday through Sunday of the current week

viewModelComputedProperties.name: monthlySpending
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Total estimated cost of all checked items in the current calendar month

viewModelComputedProperties.name: spendingTrend
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage change of current week spending vs the 4-week rolling average; positive means spending more than usual

viewModelComputedProperties.name: topItems
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Top 10 most frequently purchased item names with their total purchase count across all history

viewModelComputedProperties.name: categoryBreakdown
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Total spending per category across the current month as (category, totalSpend) pairs for donut chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageTripCost
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Mean total cost per shopping trip (a trip is defined as a day with at least one checked item)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyChartData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Daily total spend for the past 28 days for the spending trend line chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: budgetInsights
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Generated text insights: budget pace (on track/over), biggest category this month, spending spike alerts, staple item reminders

dailyGoal.description: Weekly grocery budget target in dollars; shown as a progress ring on dashboard comparing actual spend vs target

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A week (Monday–Sunday) counts as active if the user checked off at least one item, indicating a completed shopping trip that week
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Compare current week spending against 4-week rolling average; flag overspending when current exceeds average by 20%+; track month-over-month shifts in category proportions to surface changing habits
insights: Budget pace: project end-of-week total based on current spending rate vs weekly budget target
Category shift: alert when any category's share of total spend increases by 15%+ vs 4-week average
Staples reminder: items purchased in 3+ of last 4 weeks that are missing from current list
Savings opportunity: identify the category with the fastest rising spend trend over 4 weeks
Shopping frequency: compare trips this month vs historical monthly average
List efficiency: ratio of items actually purchased (checked) vs items added but never checked off (abandoned)
